"'''Emperor Palpatine'''" is a volume in the [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']] series of reference books published by [[De Agostini]]. It was published on [[May 25]], [[2021]].<ref name="De Agostini" />

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''The man born Sheev Palpatine would eventually become one of the most infamous figures in galactic history. Transforming himself into the Sith Lord Darth Sidious, he orchestrated a devious scheme that earned him the position of Supreme Chancellor of the Republic, plunged the galaxy into a conflict that claimed millions of lives, and ultimately allowed him to proclaim himself Emperor. Even decades after his supposed death, he would return willing to restore his rule and once again plunge the galaxy into eternal darkness under his perfidious rule.''

*[[Galactic Emperor|Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]]
*The Palpatine Enigma
*Master Manipulator
*Under Pressure
*Distant Thunder
*Hollow Victory
*For the [[Galactic Republic|Republic]]
*Protecting [[Padmé Amidala|Amidala]]
*Uneasy Times
*Cometh the Hour
*Declaration of War
*Threats and Surprises
*The [[Dathomir]] [[Talzin|Threat]]
*Return of an [[Maul|Apprentice]]
*[[Sith]] Secrets Revealed?
*The Legacy of [[Sifo-Dyas]]
*The Last Rival
*The Time Has Come
*Revenge of the Sith
*Crowning Glory
*[[Emperor]] Palpatine
*Treachery
*The [[Luke Skywalker|Son of Skywalker]]
*The Failure
*The Turning Point
*The Trap is Set
*Too Soon
*Turmoil
*[[Operation: Cinder]]
*Rebuilding
*Something Old, Something New
*The Fall of the New [[Jedi Order]]
*The Awakening
*The [[Final Order]]
